properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v3 v4 v5 v3 v3 v6 v3 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You set me apart Gave me a new heart Filled with compassion To share Your great love

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Show me Your ways I want to know You Guide me in truth My hope is in You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: That I may dwell in Your house forever Lifting up Your name Dwell in Your house forever more

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'll hold on to You, My strength and my refuge. Whom shall I fear? I know You are near

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: All of my days I live for You, Lord Establish my path There's one thing I ask

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Holy Spirit, have Your way Sweet anointing teach our hearts Our lives, we pray
